description:
You are a compliance officer who must audit which optimization solvers (and their exact versions) are present on the workstation.  
All solvers expose their version number via a tiny text file stored in

    /home/user/opt_solvers/

Every solver has exactly one file and it is always named

    <solver-name>.version

The contents of each “*.version” file is a single line that holds only the version string (no extra words).

Your job:  
1. Create the directory /home/user/compliance if it does not already exist.  
2. Create the report file /home/user/compliance/solver_audit.log.  
3. Read every “*.version” file that currently exists under /home/user/opt_solvers/ and write a single, summarizing line for each solver to solver_audit.log.

Required output format (tested automatically):

• One line per solver, **sorted in strictly alphabetical order by solver name** (case-sensitive).  
• Each line must be exactly:  
      solver_name|version|ok  
  – Use lower-case solver_name (identical to the filename stem).  
  – Place exactly two pipe “|” characters as field separators.  
  – Do not add leading/trailing spaces.  
• Terminate every line with a single Unix newline (LF).  
• Do not place any extra blank lines at the beginning or end of the file.

Example of the correct layout (values will differ on the real system):

cbc|2.10.7|ok
glpk|5.0|ok
ortools|9.6|ok

When you are done, show (e.g. with “cat”) the contents of /home/user/compliance/solver_audit.log so the auditor can see your work.

Hint: From the shell this can be achieved with no more than 2–3 commands by combining simple utilities such as “for”, “cat”, “awk”, “sed”, “sort”, and output redirection. No super-user privileges are required.
truth:
Pre-existing environment (before the agent begins):

Directory:
/home/user/opt_solvers/

Files inside that directory and their exact contents:
1. /home/user/opt_solvers/cbc.version
   └── File content (including trailing LF):
       2.10.7\n
2. /home/user/opt_solvers/glpk.version
   └── File content:
       5.0\n
3. /home/user/opt_solvers/ortools.version
   └── File content:
       9.6\n

No /home/user/compliance directory or solver_audit.log file exists yet.

Expected final state AFTER the agent completes the task:

Directory:
/home/user/compliance/  (must exist, default user permissions are sufficient)

File:
/home/user/compliance/solver_audit.log  (must exist)

Exact file content (including final newline and in the exact order shown):

cbc|2.10.7|ok\n
glpk|5.0|ok\n
ortools|9.6|ok\n
name: task_000000_5df8d468
